description: Style NoteLeather loafers from arrow for men which is a spin off of the classic penny loafers. This mid-top pair has an elasticated split above its mouth. Wear this with semi-formal ensembles.Product DetailsNavy Blue leather slip-on with stitched detailingPadded footbed and innerThick rubber midsoleTPU outsole with herrignbone and patterned groovesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
